(typeattributeset domain (mosey_app_202504 mosey_server))
(typeattributeset file_type (mosey_server_exec))
(typeattributeset exec_type (mosey_server_exec))
(typeattributeset vendor_file_type (mosey_server_exec))
(typeattributeset system_server_service (mosey_server))
(typeattributeset service_manager_type (mosey_service_202504 mosey_server))
(typeattributeset hal_service_type (mosey_service_202504))
(type mosey_server)
(roletype object_r mosey_server)
(type mosey_server_exec)
(roletype object_r mosey_server_exec)
(allow mosey_app_202504 mosey_server (binder (call transfer)))
(allow mosey_server mosey_app_202504 (binder (transfer)))
(allow mosey_app_202504 mosey_server (fd (use)))
(allow mosey_app_202504 mosey_service_202504 (service_manager (find)))
(allow mosey_server servicemanager_202504 (binder (call transfer)))
(allow servicemanager_202504 mosey_server (binder (call transfer)))
(allow init_202504 mosey_server_exec (file (read getattr map execute open)))
(allow init_202504 mosey_server (process (transition)))
(allow mosey_server mosey_server_exec (file (read getattr map execute open entrypoint)))
(dontaudit init_202504 mosey_server (process (noatsecure)))
(allow init_202504 mosey_server (process (siginh rlimitinh)))
(typetransition init_202504 mosey_server_exec process mosey_server)
(allow mosey_server mosey_service_202504 (service_manager (add find)))
(neverallow base_typeattr_461_202504 mosey_service_202504 (service_manager (add)))
(allow mosey_server self (capability (net_admin net_raw)))
(allow mosey_server sysfs_net_202504 (dir (ioctl read getattr lock open watch watch_reads search)))
(allow mosey_server sysfs_net_202504 (file (ioctl read getattr lock map open watch watch_reads)))
(allow mosey_server sysfs_net_202504 (lnk_file (ioctl read getattr lock map open watch watch_reads)))
(allow mosey_server self (udp_socket (ioctl create)))
(allowx mosey_server self (ioctl udp_socket ((range 0x8913 0x8914) 0x8916 0x8922 0x8924 0x8936 0x8946 0x8994 0x89f1)))
(allow mosey_server self (unix_dgram_socket (ioctl)))
(allowx mosey_server self (ioctl unix_dgram_socket ((range 0x8913 0x8914) 0x8946 0x8994)))
(allow mosey_server self (packet_socket (ioctl read write create getattr setattr lock append map bind connect listen accept getopt setopt shutdown)))
(allowx mosey_server self (ioctl packet_socket (0x8913 0x8927 0x8933)))
(allow mosey_server self (netlink_route_socket (read write create nlmsg_read nlmsg_write nlmsg_readpriv nlmsg_getneigh)))
(allow mosey_server mosey_server (netlink_netfilter_socket (create)))
(allow mosey_server tun_device_202504 (chr_file (ioctl read write getattr lock append map open watch watch_reads)))
(allowx mosey_server tun_device_202504 (ioctl chr_file (0x54ca 0x54d2)))
(allow mosey_server self (tun_socket (create)))
(allow mosey_server self (netlink_generic_socket (ioctl read write create getattr setattr lock append map bind connect getopt setopt shutdown)))
(allowx mosey_server self (ioctl netlink_generic_socket (0x8946)))
(typeattribute base_typeattr_461_202504)
(typeattributeset base_typeattr_461_202504 (and (domain) (not (mosey_server))))
